channel.title: Azure Migration Monitor
channel.description: Azure storage migration queries from Reddit, Stack Overflow, and community forums with suggested responses.

item.title: Reddit r/azure: How to migrate on-prem file server to Azure Files?
item.description:
Source: Reddit r/azure
Question: How to migrate on-prem file server to Azure Files?
We have about 5TB of data on our on-prem file server and need to move it to Azure Files. What is the best approach?
---
Suggested Response: You can use AzCopy to migrate your on-premises file server to Azure Files. Steps: 1. Install AzCopy: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/storage/common/storage-use-azcopy-v10 2. Create an Azure Files share in the Azure portal 3. Generate a SAS token 4. Run: azcopy copy source destination --recursive Full guide: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/storage/common/storage-migration-overview
